summary: Frontend-only testing of new /contact and /about pages, per-page Helmet SEO, og:image, sitemap, navbar/footer links, and repair-form submission. All targeted checks passed.
tests_executed: GET /sitemap.xml -> contains /about and /contact (and homepage + services + areas)

/contact: data-testid='contact-page' present, document.title = 'Contact Us — Phone & Computer Repair Shop in Burnley | Euro Mobile & Computer', address (60 Keirby Walk, BB11 2DE), phone 01282 761818, WhatsApp +44 786 94 92 537 and email visible, Google maps iframe present, contact-directions present, repair-form present
/contact repair form submission (form-name/phone/email/model/issue + repair-form-submit) -> repair-success panel shown

/about: data-testid='about-page', document.title = 'About Us — 22 Years of Repairs in Burnley | Euro Mobile & Computer', story text visible, animated stat counters render, about-cta-quote opens data-testid='quote-modal'
Navbar nav-link-about and nav-link-contact navigate correctly from / and from /services/iphone-repair

Per-page Helmet SEO on /, /contact, /about, /services/iphone-repair, /areas/nelson — exactly 1 <meta name=description> each, all 5 descriptions are unique, og:image equals https://euromobilecomputer.co.uk/og-image.png on every page
notes: querySelectorAll('title') returns 2 on each page (1 head <title> + 1 SVG <title> inside embedded icons/Google maps SVG). The head <title> and document.title are unique per page and correct. This is not a bug — react-helmet-async correctly manages a single head <title>.
Repair form submission persisted (POST /api/repair-requests succeeded with repair-success panel rendered).
critical_code_review_comments: ContactPage.jsx: <iframe loading='lazy'> for Google Maps is good; consider adding title attribute (already present).

Helmet titles: SEO component appends '| Euro Mobile & Computer' when the title doesn't already include 'Euro Mobile' — current titles for /contact and /about embed it correctly. Minor: could be split out as a constant.
AboutPage.jsx Counter is animated client-side; ensure value visible without JS for SEO (nice-to-have).
seed_data_creation: 1 repair-request created via /contact form with name 'TEST_Contact_User'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified new /contact and /about pages, react-helmet-async per-page SEO uniqueness, og:image served (200) and embedded on all sampled pages, sitemap includes /about and /contact, navbar+footer routing to new pages, and contact-page repair form e2e. All passed. Test DOM 'titles=2' is expected because of SVG <title> elements — only the head <title> is what matters.
